meaning: World Meteorological Organization,世界气象组织
examples: Thus was born the predecessor of our WMO Executive Council.
The new booklet is also a renewed effort to preserve WMO history for future generations.
Final figures for 2011's weather will be published by the WMO in March next year.
"Greenhouse gas concentrations have reached record levels despite the economic slowdown, " observed WMO secretary-general Michel Jarraud.
About 40% of the nitrous oxide emitted is from human activity, according to WMO estimates.
